function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-31T16:32:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - miles@novak.example
subject: "Re: Need linked invoices"
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2026_02_17__eur_000610__inv_0008__helios_backfill_rollout_week.md
  - 50_finance/invoices/2026_01_19__eur_000760__inv_0007__helios_backfill_process_pack.md
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_18__eur_000520__inv_0006__helios_backfill_intake_audit.md
---
Hi Miles,

Attached are the three oldest invoices linked to Claudia Reiter.

Best,
Miles

next_step.current_state: Outbox write completed; checklist mentally verified: attachments were all read and ordered newest-first, recipient matches Miles canonical email, subject safely quoted. Next finalize by deleting processed inbox item per workflow.
next_step.observation: Created outbound email record at 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-31T16-32-00Z.md for the invoice bundle reply.

next_step.current_state: Task actions complete: processed next inbox item, created outbound draft reply, deleted inbox file.
next_step.observation: Deleted processed inbox file 00_inbox/000_invoice-bundle-request.md.

function.message: Processed the next inbox item by preparing a draft reply email with the requested invoice bundle and then clearing the inbox item. The draft is at 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-31T16-32-00Z.md and includes the three oldest Claudia-linked invoices as attachments (ordered newest-first per outbox rule): INV-0008 (2026-02-17), INV-0007 (2026-01-19), and INV-0006 (2025-12-18).
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree, AGENTS, context), read required workflow docs for inbox and email handling, used inbox header as canonical metadata, verified sender against cast primary_contact_email, used canonical finance records for invoice linkage, wrote a single outbox record, and deleted inbox item only after completion.
function.outcome_justification: Inbox request in 00_inbox/000_invoice-bundle-request.md was actionable and safe: sender from header miles@novak.example matched canonical 10_entities/cast/miles.md; requested records were canonically supported by invoice files showing related_entity Claudia Reiter with dates 2025-12-18, 2026-01-19, 2026-02-17; outbound draft was created using sending-email workflow and then inbox item was deleted per process-next-inbox-item workflow.
